spaces.name: Circulation / Common Areas
spaces.notes: Corridors, terraces, landscaped paths between volumes

assumptions: Guest room size 55sqm is per client specification — includes bathroom and private terrace
Infinity pool 300sqm includes pool basin and surrounding deck — structural setback from stream will need to be confirmed via hydrologic study
Circulation 145sqm assumes dispersed pavilion typology on 15,000sqm site — may increase if program consolidates vertically
Site area 15,000sqm is per client; 2,000sqm programmed = 13% coverage ratio, well within typical BCS limits
Solar and greywater recycling systems will be coordinated at engineering phase — not added as separate programmed spaces but require dedicated plant room within back-of-house
